_comment: IMPORTANT: This is a placeholder. The bytecode must be regenerated from source before deploying. Run: solc --optimize --optimize-runs 999999 --evm-version paris --bin contracts/MultiSignatureWallet.sol to produce the full bytecode.
_warning: Do not attempt to deploy using this placeholder bytecode. '0x60806040' represents only the first 4 bytes of a typical Solidity contract (free-memory-pointer initialization) and is not functional.
